Dear Carlos,

Re: Case d639f721-df33-421a-a051-5ee354ea2e68 — Billing Dispute

We have received your inquiry regarding the charge on your account. Our team has thoroughly reviewed your transaction history and the specific charge in question.

After careful investigation, we have identified the transaction and verified the details with our payment processing system. The charge was processed on February 03, 2026 and corresponds to a purchase made through our platform.

We understand your concern and have taken steps to ensure this matter is resolved. If you believe this charge is still incorrect, please provide additional documentation, and we will conduct a further review. Our records team is available to assist you with any questions.

Sincerely,
Customer Resolution Team | CLARA Banking Services | Case Ref: d639f721-df33-421a-a051-5ee354ea2e68

Dear Thomas,

Re: Case 6dbedf3e-2f70-41a1-85cb-15101e404909 — Card Issue

Thank you for contacting us about your card issue. We understand how important it is to have reliable access to your account.

We have processed your request and a replacement card has been issued. Your new card will arrive at your registered address within 7-10 business days. For security purposes, you will need to activate the card upon receipt.

In the meantime, you can continue to access your account through our mobile app and website for online transactions. We appreciate your patience during this process.

Best regards,
Support Team

Dear Natasha,

Re: Case 17bbfd09-1fe1-41e4-b466-d09d361e3bc9 — Account Access

We apologize for the difficulty you experienced accessing your account. Our technical team has investigated the login issues you reported.

We have identified that your account security settings required verification, which may have prevented normal access. We have now reset your authentication credentials and sent you a secure link to regain access to your account.

Please follow the instructions in the separate email we sent to restore your account access. If you continue to experience issues, our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.

Sincerely,
Customer Resolution Team | CLARA Banking Services | Case Ref: 17bbfd09-1fe1-41e4-b466-d09d361e3bc9

Dear Wei,

Re: Case 75b173ba-9448-4403-afe2-c65cb73aff4c — Fraud

Thank you for alerting us to the suspicious activity on your account. We take fraud prevention very seriously and have immediately initiated a security review of your account.

Our fraud investigation team has examined the transactions you reported and has taken appropriate action to protect your account. We have temporarily restricted certain account functions while we complete our investigation.

For your security, we recommend monitoring your account closely and reporting any additional unauthorized activity. We will provide you with an update on our investigation within 5-7 business days.

Sincerely,
Customer Resolution Team | CLARA Banking Services | Case Ref: 75b173ba-9448-4403-afe2-c65cb73aff4c
